summary: Completed SEO testing of city+service pages. 9/10 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) Page titles in correct format '{Service} Repair {City} | Same-Day | FixitBay', 2) Robots meta tag set to 'index, follow' on all city+service pages, 3) No '6-month warranty' text found, 4) 180-day warranty text present, 5) Content rendering (H1, FAQs, Common Problems, Pricing) all working correctly. ONE ISSUE FOUND: /book page does NOT have noindex as required.

seo_issues.issue: /book page missing noindex - should have noindex per requirements but currently has 'index, follow'
seo_issues.fix: Add noindex={true} prop to SEOMetaTags in BookPage.js line ~122

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Add noindex={true} to SEOMetaTags in /app/frontend/src/components/pages/BookPage.js (line ~122-128)
critical_code_review_comments: CityServicePage.js correctly generates page titles in format '{Service} Repair {City} | Same-Day | FixitBay'
SEOMetaTags.js properly defaults noindex to false and sets robots content dynamically
BookPage.js is missing noindex={true} prop - this needs to be added to prevent /book from being indexed
All city+service pages correctly have 'index, follow' robots meta (no noindex)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified SEO meta tags on city+service pages. Page titles are in correct format. Robots meta is 'index, follow' on all indexable pages. ONE ISSUE: /book page needs noindex={true} added to SEOMetaTags component. Content rendering (H1, FAQs, pricing, common problems) all verified working. No '6-month warranty' text found anywhere.
rca_of_the_issue: BookPage.js at line 122-128 uses SEOMetaTags but does not pass noindex={true} prop. The SEOMetaTags component defaults noindex to false, so /book page gets 'index, follow' instead of 'noindex, follow'. Fix: Add noindex={true} to the SEOMetaTags call in BookPage.js
